of Non-Emergent Hyperbaric Oxygen (HBO) Therapy - CMS implemented a prior authorization model from 2015 until 2018 for non-emergent HBO therapy in Illinois, Michigan, and New Jersey that tested whether prior authorization helps reduce expenditures, while maintaining or improving quality of care.
